text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 
27 
EM_MDCR_PMT 
LABEL: 
Evaluation and Management Medicare Payments 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for the Part B evaluation and management (E/M) services 
for a given year. E/M claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data files, and a 
subset of physician claims. 
The E/M claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code
